description: Web dashboard for managing and visualizing AI memory stores. Browse, search, edit, and inspect memory entries across agents. Seeded with real data from the household ogham-memory MCP store.
features: 3-panel layout: profile/source/tag nav → memory list → detail view
Full CRUD: add, edit, delete memories (client state)
Real seed data from ogham-memory (5 profiles, eve: 7802 memories)
